# services.flap-alerted

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.flap-alerted`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.flap-alerted.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable FlapAlerted. |
| `services.flap-alerted.environmentFiles` | `list of absolute path` | Files to load environment variables from. This is useful to avoid putting secrets into the nix store. See <https://github.com/Kioubit/FlapAlerted> for a list of options. |
| `services.flap-alerted.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command line arguments to pass to FlapAlerted. See <https://github.com/Kioubit/FlapAlerted> for a list of options. |
| `services.flap-alerted.package` | `package` | The flap-alerted package to use. |
| `services.flap-alerted.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (null or string or signed integer or boolean)` | Configuration of FlapAlerted. See <https://github.com/Kioubit/FlapAlerted> for a list of options. |
| `services.flap-alerted.settings.asn` | `32 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 4294967295 (both inclusive)` | Your ASN number |
| `services.flap-alerted.settings.bgpListenAddress` | `string` | Address to listen on for incoming BGP connections |
| `services.flap-alerted.settings.debug` | `boolean` | Enable debug mode (produces a lot of output) |
